title: calymmodon fragilis
intro: Calymmodon fragilis, also known as the fragile fern, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and soothing coughs, making it a potential remedy for various respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Calymmodon fragilis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting them in a tea, and it's also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice or ointment.
